title: Election date 2026 LIVE: Kerala, Assam, Puducherry to vote on April 9; Tamil Nadu and West Bengal to vote on April 23
description: Election dates 2026 LIVE: Assam, Kerala and Puducherry will head to the polls on April 9 in a single phase voting, Meanwhile, Tamil Nadu will go to vote on April 23. West Bengal elections will be held in two phases - April 23 and 29.
